description: Analyze the utility billing data to include billing cycle durations, daily usage averages, and month-over-month changes. Identify high-usage periods using conditional formatting and address data quality issues such as estimated readings. Save the final analysis to /home/ga/Documents/utility_analysis.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Analyze the utility bill data to understand usage patterns. Calculate days in each billing period, daily average usage, and month-over-month percentage changes. Apply conditional formatting to highlight high-usage months (over 30 kWh/day). Flag estimated readings.
